What is the size of Sandip University's campus?
The university has a campus spanning across 250+ acres.
Is Sandip University a NAAC 'A' accredited university?
Yes, Sandip University is a NAAC 'A' accredited top private university in India.
Do international students need to register on the study in India portal?
Yes, all international students are required to register on the study in India portal: www.studyinindia.gov.in
Is the National Education Policy (NEP) implemented at Sandip University?
The NEP has been implemented from the academic year 2023-24 as per the guidelines from UGC and directives of the State Government of Maharashtra.
What is the placement assistance offered by Sandip University?
Sandip University provides 100% placement assistance to its students
What kind of accommodation options are available in the hostels?
The hostels offer hygienic and comfortable living spaces for students.
How do you ensure a holistic student experience at the university?
We provide hands-on skill development training, subject-wise labs, and value addition programs to give students a well-rounded education.
What is the availability of hostel rooms at Sandip University?
The university has a limited number of hostel rooms available for students.
Can I stay in the hostel if I'm not a student at Sandip University?
No, the hostel facilities are exclusively reserved for students enrolled in our programs.
What kind of security measures does the hostel have?
The hostel has 24x7 security personnel and CCTV cameras to ensure a safe and secure environment for residents.
Are there any recreational facilities available at the hostel?
Yes, the hostel has a salon, gymnasium, and library that students can use during their free time.
Is there medical assistance available in case of emergencies?
Yes, the university has an on-campus ambulance service and medical team to provide immediate assistance in case of any medical emergency.
What are the check-in and check-out times at the hostel?
Check-in is available from 14:00 to 18:00, while check-out is required by 11:00.
Can I store my luggage at the hostel?
Yes, we offer a free luggage storage service for guests who need it.
What are the check-in and check-out timings at the hostel?
The check-in time is from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM, while the check-out time is by 11:00 AM.
Can I bring my pet to the hostel?
No, pets are not allowed in the hostel due to health and hygiene concerns.
What are the hostel facilities like at Sandip University?
Sandip University provides comfortable and well-maintained hostels for its students, equipped with modern amenities.
Can I change my stream once I've registered for SU-JEE 2026-27?
No, once you've registered for a particular stream in SU-JEE 2026-27, you cannot change it; you'll need to re-register if you want to apply for another stream.
What happens in case of technical issues during the examination?
In case of unforeseen circumstances such as power or technical failure, students will be required to appear for the test a second time.
